title: Playboy Bunny Armor
description: This resource pack turns your armor into a... playboy bunny outfit
body:
# What changed?
It's a small Resource Pack That turns your regular armor into a **Playboy Bunny outfit**! That's the change **ALL** we wanted from Mojang all along!
#  This Resource pack requires [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to work correctly!
![EMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c45ba510a378c70089c50366103b729cc44f3b00.png) ![EFT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13cc3c983b2a0fbbcc6d53eb503a1fdcae208741.png)


![All of the armor in the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a2065d01309d93fe728564e972dca6ea83ffad0.png)
